title: Knuckle & Finger Plasters - Assorted Durable Protection for All Finger Sizes - Perfect for Active Lifestyles - Pack of 30
features: VERSATILE & COMPREHENSIVE PROTECTION: Our knuckle & finger plasters come in various sizes, ensuring the perfect fit for all finger sizes and offering complete coverage for cuts, scrapes, or blisters on any part of your fingers.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made with top-grade adhesive and padding, these plasters provide a strong yet gentle grip on your skin, keeping out dirt and bacteria, while allowing your wounds to heal quickly and comfortably.

PERFECT FOR ACTIVE LIFESTYLES: Designed with athletes and outdoor enthusiasts in mind, our plasters provide the ultimate finger protection, whether you're rock climbing, playing sports, or simply enjoying your favorite outdoor activities.
EASY TO USE & APPLY: The user-friendly design of ours knuckle & finger plasters allows for quick and hassle-free application, perfect for both adults and children to use with ease and confidence.

PACK OF 30 - GREAT VALUE: With a generous pack of 30 Knuckle & Finger Plasters, you'll have more than enough durable protection for all your finger injury needs, making it a cost-effective and essential addition to your first-aid kit.
description: Discover the ultimate protection for your fingers with our knuckle & finger plasters. This pack of 30 delivers an assortment of sizes to fit any finger perfectly. Crafted for durability, these plasters are robust enough to withstand an active lifestyle, ensuring your wounds are shielded from dirt and bacteria. Tailored not only for protection, but comfort as well, these plasters feature flexible fabric that moves with your fingers, maintaining coverage without restricting movement. Ideal for any injury, big or small, our knuckle & finger plasters deliver the protection you need to keep going.
